name: Spicy Pork Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare salsa, guacamole or both.
2. Combine barbecue sauce, taco seasoning mix and water in a medium saucepan or microwave-safe bowl. Bring to a boil over medium heat or in the microwave.
3. Slowly add finely diced cooked pork. Stir until well coated.
4. Lower the heat and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, or heat in the microwave for 3-4 minutes on medium power, stirring frequently.
5. Arrange lettuce, cheese, cucumber, radishes and olive slices on a large platter.
6. Spoon the pork mixture into individual bowls.
7. Heat the flour tortillas in foil in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) until soft and flexible.
8. Assemble each burrito by placing a portion of the pork mixture onto a tortilla, adding salsa and guacamole as desired.
9. Fold the sides and top of the tortilla over the filling to create a secure package.
